response: Acme Corp reported quarterly revenues of $12.3M in Q1, $14.1M in Q2, $11.8M in Q3, and $16.2M in Q4, totaling $54.4M for the year, with an 18% year-over-year growth. The company, which employs 342 people and is headquartered in Austin, TX, has demonstrated consistent revenue performance across all four quarters.
